query:
-- Insert 5 real sample registered users with required openId
INSERT INTO users (openId, name, email, role, hasRegistered) VALUES
('open_sarah_chen_001', 'Sarah Chen', 'sarah.chen@example.com', 'user', 1),
('open_marcus_johnson_002', 'Marcus Johnson', 'marcus.j@example.com', 'user', 1),
('open_priya_patel_003', 'Priya Patel', 'priya.patel@example.com', 'user', 1),
('open_david_kim_004', 'David Kim', 'david.kim@example.com', 'user', 1),
('open_emma_rodriguez_005', 'Emma Rodriguez', 'emma.r@example.com', 'user', 1);

-- Get the IDs of newly created users
SELECT id, name, openId FROM users WHERE name IN ('Sarah Chen', 'Marcus Johnson', 'Priya Patel', 'David Kim', 'Emma Rodriguez');
